title: Gushing Over Magical Girls
sourceNotes: Source is Akihiro Ononaka's manga (AniList 109017), ongoing (~ch. 63 as of June 2026, 12 volumes; the manga went on hiatus for the author's health from March 2024 to October 2025). The 13-episode Season 1 anime adapts chapters 1-24. No named story arcs; this is an episodic dark-comedy magical-girl parody, so the anime run is grouped as one block with the unadapted tail (including material for the announced Season 2) left as chapters-only.
